items.headline: What Makes Denali Therapeutics (DNLI) One of the Best AI Driven Biotech Names
items.summary: Denali Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ:DNLI) is one of the 10 best AI driven biotech stocks to invest in. On May 22, Denali Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ:DNLI) halted its joint work with Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIB), around the development of BIIB122 for idiopathic Parkinson’s disease. The decision came after topline results from the Phase 2b LUMA trial showed that […]

items.headline: Should Biogen’s (BIIB) New SMA Breakthrough and Lupus Data Prompt a Fresh Look From Investors?
items.summary: In early June 2026, Biogen reported that the FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy Designation to its investigational SMA treatment salanersen, while also, alongside UCB, presenting additional positive Phase 3 data for lupus candidate dapirolizumab pegol at the EULAR 2026 Congress. Together, these developments highlight Biogen’s expanding late-stage pipeline in severe neuromuscular and autoimmune diseases, with salanersen’s once-yearly dosing and dapirolizumab pegol’s steroid-sparing potential...

items.headline: A Look At Biogen (BIIB) Valuation After New Breakthrough SMA Nod And Positive Lupus Phase 3 Data
items.summary: Biogen (BIIB) is back in focus after the FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy Designation to its spinal muscular atrophy candidate salanersen, while fresh Phase 3 lupus data with partner UCB highlighted dapirolizumab pegol’s clinical profile.
